title: paul russells 1.7-litre 3000w electric kettle is made of stainless steel with 360-degree rotation, fast Boil, auto shut-off feature, removable water filter, UK plug, boil-dry protection, Energy Saving
features: Efficient Rapid Boiling: The Paul Russells 3000W Stainless Steel Cordless Kettle supports fast boiling with a single-touch button opening and spill-proof spout. The illuminated on/off switch adds to its convenience.

Comprehensive Safety Measures: Experience heightened safety with features such as lift switch-off, automatic shut-off, and protection against boil-dry and overheating. Secure cable storage beneath the base ensures both your safety and the longevity of your kettle.

Precise Filling Convenience: Enjoy precise filling with the jug's visible water scale for even heating, along with a 360-degree base for consistent results. Elevate your modern kitchen with this feature, seamlessly blending style and functionality.

Enhanced Features for Optimal Pouring: Enjoy precise filling with the jug's visible water scale for even heating, along with a 360-degree base for consistent results. Elevate your modern kitchen with this feature, seamlessly blending style and functionality.

Comprehensive 3-Year Warranty: Get peace of mind with Paul Russells' 3-year Guarantee (Terms & Conditions Apply). It provides comprehensive coverage and prompt assistance for any inquiries or issues related to the product.
description: Product Description Key Features paul russells Electric Steel Kettle - 1.7 Litre, 3000-Watts fast Boil power The Paul Russells 3000W Electric 304 Premium Rated Stainless Steel Cordless Kettle - 1.7 Litre is designed to quickly boil water with its one-touch button opening and spill-proof spout. It has an illuminated on/off switch for easy use, as well as safety features such as lift switch-off, automatic shut-off, and protection against boil-dry overheating. The base has secure cable storage for safety and to extend the kettle's lifespan. The visible water scale ensures precise filling for even heating, and the 360-degree base provides consistent results. This kettle combines style and functionality, making it a valuable addition to any modern kitchen.
